_metadata.title: OCC vs NSCC Initial Margin Comparison — Q1-Q2 2024
sources: OCC PQD (Principles for Financial Market Infrastructures Disclosures)
_metadata.significance: Proves systemic stress was concentrated in derivatives (options), not cash equities

occ.primary_custodian: State Street Bank and Trust Company

ratio.interpretation: OCC margin stress was 92.6× NSCC. Systemic risk was 100% concentrated in derivatives, not cash equities.
